title: dnata India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: dnata India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at dnata India are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Lucknow. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About dnata India:
dnata India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with dnata India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
